content:
A question, if you may... I just tested Liz and Clementine together and I felt them... anti-synergic, so I wonder what I missed here because Calm is listed as a character Liz works well with

The issue is that to stack STR, Clementine need to always be the one casting the first skill of the round, which means she fills the ultra bar with her own skills, while, ideally, I would think that you throw a lot bigger nuke if you fill that bar with Deadly Flames

Could you explain me your reasoning, <@212031841786527764> ?
I trust there is a reason to put Clem in Liz section, and I'd wish to understand it

content:
Gameplan:

1. Build up flames and either strength or damage amp (gDoll).
2. Unload a lot of deadly flames with Liz exalt. 
3. Then tank and try to trigger poison (gDoll posse, Nymph exalt or Xu cards).
thread_title: Morimens New Player Handbook by Cheri [V2.4 Game Guide]

content: yeah, that's more what I suspected.... a full ultra bar of flame is too great to pass

content: I usually aim to fill the bar with flame, and have 5 flames in hand when the ultra is ready
thread_title: Morimens New Player Handbook by Cheri [V2.4 Game Guide]

content: So I can trigger 10 of them at once
thread_title: Morimens New Player Handbook by Cheri [V2.4 Game Guide]

content:
This is more a new player thing. Focusing too much on value for the first card played. 

Focus on the game plan and let the first card match the gameplan.

I actally heavily play Daff's defense or strike as leap (I put chains wheel on her to generate her cards). In Ultra space all those cards trigger leap, so it a free card as you get back 1 arthimetica each time. This then builds up your alimus so I can overexalt Daff and play 3 thousand cards.
thread_title: Morimens New Player Handbook by Cheri [V2.4 Game Guide]
